## Type

- [ ] Numerical / citation correction (content)
- [ ] Handwavium-trace addition
- [ ] Typst template / build fix

## Summary

<!-- One to three sentences. What changed, why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No changes to `ref-docs/` (source-of-authority is changed only through explicit versioning)
- [ ] No changes to `code-artifacts/` (frozen reference implementations)
- [ ] Numerical values match `docs/01-design-basis.md` (or this PR updates the design basis too, consistently)
- [ ] Any physics-violating claim cites an HW-ID from `docs/10-handwavium-ledger.md`
- [ ] `to-dos/PROJECT-STATUS.md` updated if a milestone / risk / decision changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow the conventional-commits style (`fix:`, `docs:`, `feat:`, `refactor:`, `chore:`)
